arts.ttl: Napoli Identify Man Utd Castaway as Low-Cost Defensive Addition
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United could return to the negotiating table this winter after arranging Scott McTominay's transfer to Italy in the summer. According to NapoliCalcioLive, Antonio Conte has set his sights on the injury-prone Luke Shaw to replace Mario Rui. The post Napoli Identify Man Utd Castaway as Low-Cost Defensive Addition appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli Handed New Hope to Sign Danilo from Juventus
arts.sum: Despite the recent announcements by Danilo and Cristiano Giuntoli, a transfer to Napoli is still on the table, Antonio Conte continues to consider him the ideal man to shore up the backline. He’s been informed by the Bianconeri that he’s for sale. The post Napoli Handed New Hope to Sign Danilo from Juventus appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli eye Jhon Duran on recent scouting mission
arts.sum: Serie A side Napoli have maintained their keen interest in Aston Villa's rising star Jhon Duran, even after witnessing his dramatic red card during the Premier League match against Newcastle United at St James' Park. Despite Duran's early dismissal in the 32nd minute, Napoli's representatives remained undeterred. The post Napoli eye Jhon Duran on recent scouting mission appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Danilo’s dilemma: Napoli agreement and Milan’s late Interest
arts.sum: Juventus defender Danilo finds himself at the center of transfer speculation as the January window approaches. The Brazilian international, whose contract with the Bianconeri expires in June, may be on the move sooner than expected. The post Danilo’s dilemma: Napoli agreement and Milan’s late Interest appeared first on FootItalia.com.
